rollback_steps: If the squash merge causes a regression, revert the phase squash commit on main using git revert <merge_sha> and push through the normal protected-main PR path.

If a later production deployment based on this phase regresses, restore the verified Vercel rollback candidate dpl_6U5bcW5xngZMTCRECXzFZfp5Yi5f using the Vercel rollback control/API, then verify /, /blog, and /admin return expected baseline behavior.
No database rollback is required because this phase performs no schema or data mutation.
